productDisplayName: Puma Men El ace 2 White Casual Shoes
description: Absolutely stylish, comfortable and different, these puma EI Ace 2 sneakers are great for urban wear. The minimalist low profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Suede and synthetic leather upper for protection, comfort and style Perforations over the toe box for greater breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue along with textile lining for greater comfort Appliqued brand tab over the tongue and cat logo embroidered behind the collar Rubber panels on the sides for reinforcement with cat logo engraved on it Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrthoLite footbed provides breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber outsole with thatched pattern for better grip and traction
